description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rocker/r-base Docker image and runs an apt-get update && apt-get install -y -t unstable curl command in before_script. Define a deploy stage with a pages job that executes Rscript dependencies.R, copies ./data into ./public/, creates a zip archive website.zip from the contents of ./public, and then sends the zip to Netlify via curl -H "Content-Type: application/zip" -H "Authorization: Bearer $NETLIFY_TOKEN" --data-binary "@website.zip" https://api.netlify.com/api/v1/sites/tinyverse.netlify.com/deploys. Publish the ./public directory as a pages artifact. The job runs on every pipeline without additional rules.
